source: AIBAST RAR Agent Library — it_management_stacks + general_stacks

ideas.name: IT Helpdesk
ideas.desc: AI-powered IT helpdesk with automated troubleshooting, knowledge retrieval, remote remediation, and ticket management. Resolves tier-1 tickets (password resets, VPN, software access) without human intervention.

ideas.name: IT Ticket Management
ideas.desc: IT ticket management with dashboards, priority assignment, SLA tracking, and resolution reporting. Auto-categorizes incoming tickets, tracks resolution metrics, and surfaces recurring issue patterns.

ideas.name: Procurement Agent
ideas.desc: Procurement management for purchase requests, vendor comparison, approval routing, and spend analysis. Compares vendors on cost, capability, and compliance for IT hardware and software acquisitions.

ideas.name: Procurement Support
ideas.desc: Procurement support for requisition tracking, contract lookups, supplier performance, and budget checks. Tracks active contracts, monitors vendor performance against SLAs, and validates budget availability.

ideas.name: Find Accurate Models
ideas.desc: AI/ML model search and comparison by accuracy benchmarks, deployment readiness, and cost analysis. Helps IT teams evaluate and select the right AI models for organizational use cases.

ideas.name: ServiceNow Integration
ideas.desc: ServiceNow integration for incident creation, knowledge search, assignment routing, and status updates. Bridges voice/chat channels to ServiceNow with automated ticket creation and assignment group routing.
